div.div: Nepal is a country of highly diverse and rich geography, culture, and religions. The mountainous north has eight of the world's ten tallest mountains, including the highest point on Earth, Mount Everest. It is the birthplace of Gautama Buddha and offers a unique blend of adventure and spirituality.
